dsl_rule.translation_notes: Breakout pattern detected when price closes above Donchian upper band (trend-line boundary breakout). Volume condition uses hvol_20 to represent linear regression trending up relative to historical average. Linear regression of volume and U-shaped volume pattern cannot be directly expressed with allowed indicators, so volume breakout above 20-period historical volatility serves as proxy for volume confirmation. Exit when price closes below Donchian lower band (reversal signal). Pattern occurs in ANY regime as specified.

source_rule_text: Breakout pattern: Prices move outside trend-line boundaries or follow a trend line for an extended time, with breakout occurring at the highest peak in the formation
